name: Chaotic War 3
author: Poki
description: Chaotic War 3 is a strategy game where you lead your legendary army into battle against endless hordes of zombies and monsters! Recruit over 50 powerful heroes, upgrade their skills, and master elements like Fire, Ice, Thunder, and Dark to crush your enemies. Earn coins from every victory, strengthen your team, and complete 150 thrilling missions. Are you ready to command your army and dominate the battlefield? How to play Chaotic War 3? Click or tap to spawn. Click on the hero to use different skills Who created Chaotic War 3? Chaotic War 3 is created by PEGASUS. Play their other games on Poki: Cat Gunner: Super Zombie Shoot , Shark.io , Stickman Dragon Fight , How to loot - Pin pull , Stickman Go and Stickman Escape ! How can I play Chaotic War 3 for free? You can play Chaotic War 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Chaotic War 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Chaotic War 3 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
